name: Overdue Payment
query:
SELECT

tb.name AS "Booking ID:Link/Travel Booking",
tb.customer AS "Customer:Link/Customer",
c.customer_phone AS "Phone:Data",
ps.amount AS "Due Amount:Currency",
ps.due_date AS "Due Date:Date",
DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), ps.due_date) AS "Days Overdue:Int"
from `tabTravel Booking` as tb
join `tabPayment Schedule` as ps
on tb.name= ps.parent
left join `tabCustomer` as c
on c.name=tb.customer
where ps.status!="Paid"
AND ps.due_date < CURDATE()
ORDER BY ps.due_date ASC;
